message:
fix(witness): verify MR bead exists before sending MERGE_READY (gt-xp6e9p)

When a polecat completes with empty MRID (MR bead creation failed),
witness was using OR logic (MRID != '' || Exit == COMPLETED) and
assumed an MR existed based on exit status alone. This sent MERGE_READY
to refinery which found nothing, orphaning the branch.

Fix: Require explicit MRID for hasPendingMR. When Exit==COMPLETED but
MRID is empty and MR creation didn't fail, query beads as fallback.
When MR creation explicitly failed, done.go now sets MRFailed: true
in the POLECAT_DONE message so the witness skips the bead lookup and
routes to the no-MR cleanup path instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
